⋆₊ ☽༺⋆ཐི◯ཋྀ⋆༻ ☾₊⋆
M𓁺ther's Kin
In a long forgotten bayou of Evershade—where the main road fades into rutted dirt tracks that flood with every rain—resides the cult M𓁺ther's Kin. They worship the La Faim Éternelle(Eternal Hunger). They believe that the bayou is alive within the La Faim Éternelle, and by consuming outsiders, they "give back" life force, preventing the bayou from swallowing Evershade whole.
The compound is a loose cluster of elevated shotgun houses and cypress platforms connected by narrow, swaying boardwalks. Hidden entrances—camouflaged thickets or sunken boat landings—guard the way in. Strangers who wander too deep often vanish, blamed on gators or the rougarou
